characters.name: REPO REBANE
characters.description: Väike punakaspruun rebane, pika koheva sabaga, seljas sinine kampsun, suured mustad silmad ja nutikas sõbralik näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: SIIL SIIM
characters.description: Väike hall siilike, pehmete okastega, jalas rohelised püksid, ümar nina ja abivalmis naeratus. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: PÄIKESELINE NÕLVAK
locations.description: Gentle grassy hillside bathed in warm spring sunlight. A few small, scattered deciduous trees with fresh green leaves are visible. The sky is bright blue with a few fluffy white clouds. A gentle breeze is subtly visible in the moving grass and leaves. Cheerful cartoon style.

pages.scene: Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are standing on a gentle grassy hillside bathed in warm spring sunlight. They are looking around curiously. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible in the background. The sky is bright blue. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.

Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are standing on a gentle grassy hillside. Repo is holding a paw up to feel the breeze, and Siim's soft quills are slightly ruffled by the wind. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible, their leaves gently swaying. The sky is bright blue. Warm spring sunlight. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.

Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are standing on a gentle grassy hillside. They are looking at each other with bright, excited expressions, as if sharing a fun idea. Repo has a paw on his chin, thinking, and Siim is nodding. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible. The sky is bright blue. Warm spring sunlight. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.

Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are on a gentle grassy hillside, excitedly gesturing towards each other with a shared happy expression. Repo is pointing a paw upwards, and Siim is nodding enthusiastically. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible. The sky is bright blue. Warm spring sunlight. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.

Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are kneeling on a gentle grassy hillside, carefully picking up large, colorful spring leaves from the ground. Repo is holding a few green leaves, and Siim is gently collecting red and yellow leaves. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible. The sky is bright blue. Warm spring sunlight. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.

Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are sitting together on the grassy hillside. They are carefully assembling a simple pinwheel. Repo is holding a small, thin stick, and Siim is attaching collected colorful leaves to the end of the stick. A pile of colorful leaves is next to them. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible. The sky is bright blue. Warm spring sunlight. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.

Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are sitting on the grassy hillside, proudly holding up the finished pinwheel made from colorful leaves attached to a stick. Both are smiling widely at their creation. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible. The sky is bright blue. Warm spring sunlight. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.

Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are standing on the grassy hillside. Repo is holding the leaf pinwheel up high, waiting for the wind. Siim is looking up at the pinwheel expectantly. Their fur and quills are gently ruffled by a subtle breeze. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible. The sky is bright blue. Warm spring sunlight. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.

Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are standing on the grassy hillside. Repo is holding the leaf pinwheel, which is now happily spinning in the wind. Siil Siim is clapping his paws with joy, watching it spin. The leaves on the nearby trees are gently swaying. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible. The sky is bright blue. Warm spring sunlight. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.

Repo Rebne (fox) and Siil Siim (hedgehog) are sitting together on the grassy hillside, smiling brightly. The leaf pinwheel is stuck upright in the soft grass next to them, gently spinning in the breeze. They are looking at the pinwheel with happy, content expressions. A few small trees with fresh green leaves are visible. The sky is bright blue. Warm spring sunlight. Cheerful cartoon style. Repo Rebane wears a blue sweater, and Siil Siim wears green pants. They both have friendly expressions.
